name: Texas People Federal Credit Union
description_short: Texas People Federal Credit Union is a member-owned credit union offering checking, savings, loans, and credit products with fixed-rate student loan refinancing and auto loan discounts.
description_long:
Texas People Federal Credit Union operates as a member-owned financial institution providing comprehensive banking services to the Fort Worth area and beyond. Established with a focus on personalized, community-based banking, the credit union positions itself as offering "down-home banking" with "up-town service." The organization maintains physical locations with lobby and drive-thru hours, supplemented by 24/7 online banking access.

The credit union offers a diverse product suite including checking and savings accounts, youth/teen savings options, IRAs, personal loans, auto loans, credit cards, mortgage loans, home equity loans, and student loan refinancing. Their student loan refinancing program features fixed rates ranging from 3.95% APR (with auto-pay) to 9.16% APR. They also offer a MasterCard credit card at 9.9% APR with reward points, auto loans with rate reductions up to 2% off current rates plus a $100 Shell gas card incentive, and specialized products like parent loans and deferred payment programs.

What distinguishes Texas People FCU is its membership structure and referral incentives—members can refer friends and family for up to $250 rewards, and new checking account holders receive $25. The credit union provides fee-free ATM access through shared branching networks and includes loan protection services. They also feature an integrated auto financing tool (EZ Car Finder) covering vehicles, golf carts, marine vessels, motorcycles, powersports, and RVs. Online and mobile banking, check ordering, and financial calculators are standard offerings.

The credit union demonstrates transparency with published fee schedules, privacy policies, and disclosures. However, members should note that specific rates, fees, and eligibility requirements are not detailed on the website landing page, requiring direct contact or application. The organization explicitly warns about phone number spoofing fraud and confirms they never solicit full card numbers.
pros: Student loan refinancing with fixed rates as low as 3.95% APR with auto-pay, competitive in market
Auto loan discounts up to 2% off current rate plus $100 Shell gas card incentive
MasterCard credit card at 9.9% APR with reward points, lower than market average for standard cards
Member referral program offering up to $250 per referred member, financial incentive for growth
$25 new checking account bonus for account opening
24/7 online banking and fee-free ATM access through shared branching network
Diverse loan products including home equity loans, personal loans, parent loans, and deferred payment programs
cons: Specific APR rates, fees, and loan terms are not fully detailed on website; members must contact or apply to receive quotes
Physical branch locations appear limited to Fort Worth area based on website, reducing convenience for remote members
No mention of mobile app features, security certifications, or fraud protection guarantees beyond fraud reporting numbers
Website requires improvement for accessibility—organization acknowledges ongoing efforts to improve website for screen reader users
Membership eligibility requirements ("Who Can Join") are not clearly explained on the homepage
best_for: Borrowers seeking student loan refinancing with fixed rates and auto-pay discounts
Vehicle buyers in the Fort Worth area looking for auto loans with rate discounts and incentive cards
Credit union members who value referral rewards and community-based banking relationships
Consumers seeking lower APR credit cards (9.9%) with reward points accumulation
diagnosis: Texas People FCU is best for credit union members in the Fort Worth area seeking competitive rates on student loan refinancing and auto loans, or those interested in member-owned banking with referral incentives. The main caveat is that specific rates, fees, and membership eligibility are not detailed on the website, requiring direct outreach to the credit union for personalized quotes and confirmation of eligibility.
services: Checking accounts with $25 new member bonus
Savings accounts and youth/teen savings products
Auto loans with rate discounts and incentives
MasterCard credit card (9.9% APR with rewards)
Parent loans and deferred payment programs
EZ Car Finder vehicle financing tool
Fee-free ATM access via shared branching network
